topic_title: China sentences former defense ministers to death with reprieve for corruption
topic_summary: Chinese state media announced that former defense ministers have been handed suspended death sentences following corruption investigations. The move is framed by the party as a demonstration that disloyalty and graft will not be tolerated within the high command of the military.

findings.title: China’s Former Defense Ministers Sentenced to Death With Reprieve: The Reason and the Wider Implications
findings.summary: Until now, no one from the military top brass had received such severe punishments since early days of the anti-corruption campaign.
findings.text: China’s Former Defense Ministers Sentenced to Death With Reprieve: The Reason and the Wider Implications | Until now, no one from the military top brass had received such severe punishments since early days of the anti-corruption campaign.

findings.title: China verurteilt zwei Ex-Verteidigungsminister zur Todesstrafe

findings.title: Fate of China’s ex-defence heads shows party won’t allow disloyalty: state media
findings.summary:
The tough sentences handed to former defence ministers Wei Fenghe and Li Shangfu showed that Beijing had no tolerance for people with divided loyalties, the Chinese military’s official newspaper said on Friday.
The PLA Daily commentary marks the first time an official outlet has accused Li of being disloyal.
“The military wields the gun and there must be no one who harbours disloyalty to the party,” the editorial said.
“As senior party and military leaders, Wei and Li showed a collapse of fai...

findings.title: Moraes autoriza hacker Delgatti a cumprir regime aberto de prisão
findings.summary:
O ministro Alexandre de Moraes, do Supremo Tribunal Federal (STF), autorizou nesta quinta-feira (7) o hacker Walter Delgatti a passar para o regime aberto de cumprimento de pena.

Em maio de 2025, Delgatti foi condenado pelo Supremo a oito meses e seis anos de prisão em regime fechado por ter invadido o site do Conselho Nacional de Justiça (CNJ) a mando da ex-deputada Carla Zambelli, também condenada no processo, e ter emitido um mandado de prisão falso contra o ministro.

Notícias relacionad...

findings.title: Judge releases note purportedly written  by Epstein
findings.summary:
NEW YORK: A federal judge on Wednesday released a document described as a suicide note purportedly written by the late Jeffrey Epstein and including the line: “It is a treat to be able to choose ones time to say goodbye.”
Epstein, the disgraced financier and accused sex trafficker, was found dead in his Manhattan jail cell in August 2019 in what was ruled a suicide. The handwritten note was said to have been found by his former jail cellmate, convicted murderer and ex-police officer Nicholas ...

findings.title: Ukraine sentences Medinsky, head of Russian institute in absentia to ten years in prison
findings.summary: Kyiv's Shevchenkivskyi District Court has sentenced Vladimir Medinsky, an aide to Russian ruler Vladimir Putin, and Anatoly Torkunov, rector of the Moscow State Institute of International Relations at the Russian Foreign Ministry, in absentia to ten years in prison with confiscation of property over an anti-Ukrainian textbook.

findings.title: China tourist dies after cliff swing fall as safety rope was loose despite her warnings to staff
findings.summary:
A young woman tourist in China died after falling from a “cliff swing” ride after her warning that the safety rope was not tied tightly enough was ignored.
The heart-wrenching accident went viral on mainland social media and was viewed more than 200 million times.
It sparked public rage and calls for safety supervision for adventure activities to be strengthened.
On May 5, the municipal government of Huaying in southwestern China’s Sichuan province issued a statement that the tourist, surname...

findings.title: China ‘full-time children’ re-enter job market, believe experience will ease future challenges
findings.summary:
Three years after some Chinese youngsters chose to become “full-time children”, some said it was not a cure-all for their plight in China’s tense job market.
The title “full-time children” went viral in 2023 in China, when some young people became a “full-time employee” of their parents.
They received monthly salaries from their parents, ranging from 1,000 yuan (US$150) to over 5,000 yuan, depending on their parents’ pensions.
In exchange, they kept their parents’ company and helped them mana...

findings.title: Belediye başkanını kıyafeti üzerinden hedef almıştı: İkinci duruşmada tahliye
findings.summary: Eskişehir’in Mihalgazi Belediye Başkanı Zeynep Güneş Akgün’ü giydiği geleneksel kıyafetleri üzerinden hedef alan paylaşımlarda bulunduğu gerekçesiyle tutuklanan Mehmet Emin Korkmaz, ikinci duruşmada tahliye edildi. Duruşmada mütalaasını veren savcı, sanık Korkmaz hakkında ‘Halkı kin ve düşmanlığa tahrik veya aşağılama’ ve ‘Kamu görevlisine hakaret’ suçlarından 5 yıla kadar hapis talep etti.
findings.text: Belediye başkanını kıyafeti üzerinden hedef almıştı: İkinci duruşmada tahliye | Eskişehir’in Mihalgazi Belediye Başkanı Zeynep Güneş Akgün’ü giydiği geleneksel kıyafetleri üzerinden hedef alan paylaşımlarda bulunduğu gerekçesiyle tutuklanan Mehmet Emin Korkmaz, ikinci duruşmada tahliye edildi. Duruşmada mütalaasını veren savcı, sanık Korkmaz hakkında ‘Halkı kin ve düşmanlığa tahrik veya aşağılama’ ve ‘Kamu görevlisine hakaret’ suçlarından 5 yıla kadar hapis talep etti.

findings.title: China confirms it helped Pakistan’s air force during war with India last year
findings.summary:
China has confirmed for the first time that it provided on-site technical support to Pakistan during its war with India last year.
During the conflict, a Chinese-made fighter shot down at least one of India’s French-made fighters.
On Thursday, China’s state broadcaster CCTV aired an interview with Zhang Heng, an engineer from the Aviation Industry Corporation of China’s (AVIC) Chengdu Aircraft Design and Research Institute, a key developer of China’s advanced fighter aircraft and unmanned aer...

findings.title: La Audiencia de Salamanca frena el permiso penitenciario concedido al padre de Asunta
findings.summary: Los magistrados consideran que no se dan las “condiciones mínimas” para permitir la salida de prisión

findings.title: Jail for wife of ex-Citiraya boss accused of pocketing US$51 million from sale of embezzled computer chips
findings.summary: Thor Chwee Hwa and her husband, former Citiraya Industries CEO Ng Teck Lee, spent nearly two decades on the run before the law caught up with them.

findings.title: Two men first in British history to be found guilty of spying for China
findings.summary: Chi Leung Wai and Chung Biu Yuen convicted over surveillance of dissidents in ‘shadow policing’ operationA UK Border Force officer and Hong Kong trade official based in London have been found guilty of spying for China and surveilling dissidents through a “shadow policing” operation.Chi Leung “Peter” Wai, 38, and Chung Biu Yuen, 65, also known as Bill, were found guilty at the Old Bailey of assisting a foreign intelligence service, making them the first people in British history to be convict...
